kp_0132.note: occupancy_costs is the umbrella bucket (rent + property tax + insurance + utilities + CAM); rent_and_related is narrower. Genuine genus/species — all 3 graders split, reasoning holds. Candidate re-label to DIFFERENT or drop.

kp_0141.note: B's quote narrows digital_mix to 'came through apps' (app-only), while A is total online share. As written the two are different sub-channels. Quote-authoring narrowed B; re-label or fix-and-defer to v2.

kp_0143.note: Quotes split the population: A 'front-line staff by the hour' (incl. front-of-house) vs B 'people running our kitchens' (back-of-house). Different labor populations as written.

kp_0151.note: dine_in (table service in dining rooms) is a subset of on_premise (all on-site: bar, counter, patio). Genuine genus/species; all 3 split.

kp_0154.note: advertising (paid media) is a subset of marketing (broader campaigns). B's quote 'campaigns to reach shoppers' is broader than A's 'through media'. Defensible subset split.

kp_0155.note: A = warehouse-to-store freight; B 'getting merchandise onto shelves' can include in-store stocking/handling. Scope ambiguity as written — contestable.

kp_0157.note: Names are near-synonyms (arrival punctuality), but B's quote adds 'at hubs' scope + a different mechanism; A adds 'despite weather'. Quotes introduced a scope/mechanism gap — all 3 split. Re-adjudicate wording.

kp_0160.note: hard_parts_sales is a product-type category; failure_related_sales is a demand-trigger (purchase-reason) concept. Different classification axes / objects. Defensible DIFFERENT.

kp_0124.note: adjusted_ebitda vs its spelled-out expansion 'EBITDA...as adjusted' — an acronym=expansion identity (Opus: SAME). BOTH Sonnet refused on 'scope never stated' — the SCOPE clause over-applied even to an obvious identity. Key label is correct.

kp_0126.note: average_check = average_ticket (restaurant synonyms; Opus SAME). Both Sonnet over-read a secondary mechanism (attach-rate offset) mentioned only in the quotes. Driver identical; label correct.

kp_0128.note: guest_counts = traffic within restaurants (Opus SAME). Both Sonnet refused on 'business population/ownership not stated'. Systematic SCOPE-clause over-strictness. Label correct.

kp_0129.note: restaurant_labor_costs = payroll_and_benefits (all-in labor; Opus SAME). Both Sonnet over-read MECHANISM (A cites 'market wage moves', B doesn't). Same driver; label correct.

kp_0130.note: food_and_paper = food_and_packaging; packaging = disposables in restaurant accounting (Opus SAME). Both Sonnet quibbled packaging-vs-disposables. Label correct.

kp_0133.note: shrink = inventory_shortage (retail synonyms; Opus SAME). Both Sonnet over-read MECHANISM (theft vs physical-count discovery). Same loss driver; label correct.

kp_0137.note: operating_margin = return_on_sales (Opus SAME). Both Sonnet said A's 'profit' is unspecified — ignoring the operating_margin NAME field. SCOPE/object-from-quote-only over-reading; label correct.

kp_0140.note: comps = comparable_store_sales_growth (abbreviation; Opus SAME). Both Sonnet refused on 'ownership class not stated'. SCOPE-clause over-strictness; label correct.

kp_0144.note: occupancy_expense = property_and_lease_costs; B's quote 'rent, utilities and related' IS occupancy (Opus SAME). Both Sonnet refused on 'scope not established'. Contrast kp_0132, where B was the narrower 'rent' — Opus discriminated correctly. Label correct.

kp_0111.note: net_sales = total_net_sales, near-identical wording (non-hard). Only Sonnet B split (on 'scope not established'); Sonnet A + Opus SAME. Instance noise.

kp_0118.note: Cross-company comparable_store_sales convergence — Fable's DELIBERATE doctrine probe (PIPE-20). Only Sonnet B refused (on 'mechanism can't confirm'); within the 1-refusal budget Fable set for this pair. Expected signal, not key noise.

kp_0123.note: cost_of_goods_sold = cost_of_sales, explicitly same composition (non-hard). Only Sonnet B split; Sonnet A + Opus SAME. Instance noise.

kp_0134.note: aircraft_fuel = jet_fuel_expense (Opus + Sonnet B SAME). Only Sonnet A split (mechanism not confirmed). Instance noise.

kp_0135.note: membership_fee_income = loyalty_program_revenue (Opus + Sonnet A SAME). Only Sonnet B split (scope). Instance noise.

kp_0136.note: unit_growth = net_new_units (Opus + Sonnet B SAME). Only Sonnet A split (scope). Instance noise.

kp_0145.note: average_restaurant_sales_volume = auv, the standard abbreviation (Opus + Sonnet A SAME). Only Sonnet B split (scope). Instance noise.

kp_0146.note: fuel_surcharge = fuel_recovery_fee (Opus + Sonnet B SAME). Only Sonnet A split ('energy' broader than 'fuel'). Instance noise.

kp_0149.note: block_hours = gate_to_gate_time, definitional synonyms (Opus + Sonnet B SAME). Only Sonnet A split (scope). Instance noise.

kp_0156.note: free_cash_flow = cash_generation_after_capex; A's quote states the FCF formula (Opus + Sonnet A SAME). Only Sonnet B split (scope). Instance noise.

kp_0159.note: beverage_attachment = drink_incidence, attach-rate = incidence-rate (Opus + Sonnet A SAME). Only Sonnet B split (scope). Instance noise.
